title: Indian government hospital — off-hours frozen sections (no OR chargeback)
description: Same profile as TB-4 but with frozen sections performed off-hours where there is no OR chargeback to pathology. Tests attribution machinery: surgical_impact should ideally zero out when OR time is not a pathology-recoverable cost. Currently calculator has no off-hours toggle — expected behaviour is that Claude pre-review flags this, and the pillar still computes (calibration gap).

expected.notes: Test uses override or_cost_per_minute=0 as the closest in-code approximation to the off-hours case since there's no dedicated toggle. A proper fix would be a pillar-level suppression flag.
